parameters.name: view
parameters.description: Report view mode. Options: product_summary, fifo_detail. Default: fifo_detail

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Search by product name or SKU (max 255 chars)

parameters.name: has_listings
parameters.description: Filter by listing presence. Options: yes, no

parameters.name: has_sales
parameters.description: Filter by recent sales activity. Options: yes, no. See sales_period for time window

parameters.name: sales_period
parameters.description: Sales activity window used with has_sales. Options: 7d, 14d, 30d, 90d

parameters.name: sales_channel_ids
parameters.description: Comma-separated integration instance IDs to include in sales calculations

parameters.name: excluded_sales_channel_ids
parameters.description: Comma-separated integration instance IDs to exclude from sales calculations

parameters.name: listing_filter
parameters.description: Filter by listing attribute. Options: has_active_ebay_auctions, no_active_ebay_auctions, has_ended_ebay_auctions, no_ended_ebay_auctions, has_ebay_used, no_ebay_used, has_amazon_used, no_amazon_used
